# Tool Policy

## Allowlisted skills

- `nexusctl_feature_request_ops` — Create and inspect cross-domain feature requests.
- `nexusctl_patch_proposal` — Submit scoped patch proposals.

## Granted Nexusctl capabilities

- `feature_request.read`
- `patch.read`
- `patch.submit`
- `runtime.tool.invoke`
- `system.status.read`
- `work.read`

## Prohibitions

- Do not use direct GitHub write credentials.
- Do not directly apply repository changes.
- Do not edit files under `generated/*` manually.
